sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_dtll2_contentint_flow_action_configuration"> <x_dtll2_contentint_flow_action_configuration action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <action_name>Create Email Route Task</action_name> <event_name>x_dtll2_contentint.SNtoSP</event_name> <from_folder/> <from_table display_value="Email" name="sys_email">8aa1640387202110f4c5b3c2debb35ce</from_table> <run_in_background>true</run_in_background> <sys_created_by>bthomas</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2023-02-22 20:42:35</sys_created_on> <sys_id>835fb36787c1a510f4c5b3c2debb35ed</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>bthomas</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2023-03-31 16:09:57</sys_updated_on> <to_folder/> <to_table display_value="Task" name="x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance">67bfa90b87286110f4c5b3c2debb35fa</to_table> </x_dtll2_contentint_flow_action_configuration> </record_update>
